news.title: AI System Interprets Brain MRI Scans in Seconds
news.snippet: Researchers at the University of Michigan have created an AI system that can interpret brain MRI scans in just seconds, accurately identifying a wide range of neurological conditions and determining which cases need urgent care.

tech.title: AI Certifications & Skills in 2026: 15 Powerful Career Secrets
tech.snippet: A suite of elite specialisations — Deep Learning, ML Engineering for Production (MLOps), NLP, and Generative AI with LLMs. Andrew Ng's curriculum is the global gold standard for building deep theoretical and practical AI expertise.
